overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a warrior exploring an ancient library interior with scroll collections and classical statues, ascending a grand staircase, and emerging outdoors to approach the Temple of Sekhmet Yamu under bright desert sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient library hall with scroll shelves and reading tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the library hall observing scroll shelves and marble statues lining the walls

notable_agents.action: scholar seated at a table examining scrolls

entered.detail: intricate geometric mosaic tile pattern covering the floor
tall wooden shelving units filled with rolled papyrus scrolls
tall wooden shelving units filled with rolled papyrus scrolls
long marble-topped table with scrolls and writing materials
white marble statue of a robed figure on a pedestal
tall fluted column with ornate capital

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a grand ancient library hall with mosaic floors and towering wooden shelves filled with scrolls. Marble statues and columns line the space while a scholar works at a table to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase with coffered ceiling and monumental statue

events.description: character transitions from walking on flat ground to ascending the marble staircase
lighting becomes brighter as character approaches the upper level with natural light filtering from above

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide marble staircase toward the upper library level, passing a large trident-bearing statue

entered.detail: wide ceremonial staircase with worn marble steps
ornate ceiling with hexagonal coffered pattern and skylight
massive marble statue of a bearded figure holding a trident
decorative stone railing along the staircase edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand marble staircase beneath a soaring coffered dome ceiling. A massive trident-bearing statue stands to the right as the lighting brightens approaching the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper library corridor with red carpet and wall tapestries

agents.ego_description: walking along the carpeted upper corridor passing scholars conversing near scroll tables

notable_agents.action: two scholars in togas conversing beside a scroll table

entered.detail: long red patterned carpet runner along the corridor floor
large decorative tapestries in ornate frames depicting figures
built-in wall niches holding rolled scrolls

segments.scene_description: Moving through the upper library corridor, the character walks on a red carpet past scholars conversing near tables. The walls feature large framed tapestries and scroll storage niches.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach with ceremonial gateway and palm trees

events.description: abrupt transition from indoor library to bright outdoor temple courtyard
lighting shifts from artificial to bright natural sunlight causing exposure adjustment

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone gateway toward the temple facade under bright desert sun

entered.detail: massive stone gateway with decorative columns and hanging white fabric canopies
white draped fabric suspended between poles providing partial shade
tall palm trees in large decorative planters
tall palm trees in large decorative planters
imposing white stone temple with columns and Egyptian architectural motifs
tall carved stone obelisks flanking the approach

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the library into bright sunlight, the character walks through a stone gateway draped with white fabric canopies. The approach to the Temple of Sekhmet Yamu is lined with palm trees and stone obelisks under a clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded depths of a grand ancient library into the brilliant glare of a desert temple complex. It begins by gliding through a hall of mosaic floors and towering scroll shelves, passing marble statues and a working scholar. As the camera ascends a grand marble staircase beneath a soaring coffered dome, the lighting brightens, passing a massive trident-bearing statue before transitioning into an upper corridor lined with red carpets and framed tapestries. The scene then shifts from the interior's hushed atmosphere as the character emerges through a stone gateway draped in white fabric. Finally, the view opens completely under a clear blue sky, moving past palm trees and stone obelisks toward the Temple of Sekhmet Yamu.
